content: Trudy: Damn, Cait, your tits are practically spillin’ out of that harness. You really think you can swing a rifle like that without ‘em gettin’ in the way? Cait: Hah! Ain’t a problem when ya learn to work around ‘em. Besides, MJR loves when they bounce while I’m takin’ out raider scum. Nothin’ gets me wetter than sprayin’ lead and feelin’ his eyes glued to my ass mid-combat. Trudy: Saints preserve us, you’re a wreck. How’s that man keep up with you? Bet those chem-holes down in Goodneighbor can’t decide if they wanna fuck you or report you to Hancock for indecent exposure. Cait: Indecent? Fuck that. This world’s all about survival—might as well enjoy the view before someone puts a bullet in ya. And MJR? Oh, that gorgeous bastard keeps me on my back more than a synth keeps a lie goin’. Trudy: Christ almighty. And here I was just tryin’ to sell some damn soup.

Cait: Well, Trudy, if yer done clutchin' yer pearls, I'll let ya get back to yer soup before I start describin' what MJR does with a Nuka-Cola bottle. Trudy: Sweet Lord, just take a radroach steak and get the hell out of my diner before you scandalize the night any worse. Cait: Oh, I’ll take the steak— that bottle of whiskey under the counter. You keep squirin’ your eyes at MJR, I’ll give ya a real show next time. Trudy: Just go shoot something, Cait. Please.
